title: Anima and Rebuild Similarities and Shared Ideas
display_title: Anima and Rebuild Similarities and Shared Ideas
wikitext:
[]: Anima and Rebuild: Similarities and Shared Ideas             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Oct 06, 2015 6:13 pm Branching off from the Anima general thread here. As was pointed out in that thread, Anima and the Rebuild/NTE films share a number of ideas, with concepts introduced in one later popping up in the other. I thought it might be useful to catalog some of these elements in their own thread so they're much easier to find. I've put together a bunch of images for an easier direct comparison and included the dates for the Anima chapters so you can see when they were published relative to the movies. Here's an overview of the release dates for each: Films: 1.11: September 01, 2007 2.22: June 27, 2009 3.33: November 17, 2012 3.0+1.0: TBD Anima Section 1: January 2008-August 2009 Section 2: September 2009-May 2012 Section 3: June 2012-April 2013 Here we go: Nerv: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sat Oct 10, 2015 3:17 am Good work BlueBasilisk

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Sat Oct 10, 2015 5:06 am About Rei clones, aren't they referenced in some ost? Still Q delivers the reveal of Rei clones etc along with more evas with spear shaped horns and Asuka's "you must be one of the early models" and Rei's "is that me?" lines. It probably wants you to make parallels and it isn't playing subtle with bug eyed Rei faces for lilith (appeared in 1.11 so pretty much planned but then I wouldn't know about the dummy system fate - probably more kaworus but who knows that has a chance of interpretation in kaworu's lines probably referencing his and Rei's copies hasn't it). I still can't make anything of the spears deal because having them with a dedicated feature like anima's to trick kaworu wouldn't be elegant, still I don't really know how they work myself. Also I'll pick Q's slender eva designs anyday but it's me not having taste for proportions. I mean, design wise, anima dudes look pretty flawed in simple movements.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 10, 2015 5:52 am The obvious source of similarities between the two is that this time around, Yamashita has been let off the leash in the design role for new material in the NTE production. The truly off-beat ideas he has produced over the years (starting with things like Megami Syourai, and Werewolf Asuka) that previously only appeared in his own spin-off material have now leaked into the main corpus.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Oct 11, 2015 9:57 am After giving it a full read, some notes - I don't like Misato's design from ANIMA - Ayanami Mature Series looks a bit freaky - I really dig Maya's desgin in ANIMA. Total another level - Mari is uhmm......, what? - Unit 00 Booster Rocket Equipped looks really cool in space - Allegorica looks really cool - Torwart is the most coolest and badass unit in the Eva series and one of the best mecha designs ever. - Apple's Core and the Black Moon look almost the same.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Oct 11, 2015 12:13 pm Interesting stuff. That pegasus backpack thing is stupid as hell though.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Oct 11, 2015 5:28 pm Unit 02 Allegorica is pretty hideous. It looks much cooler when Rei uses it with Unit 00-F: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Oct 11, 2015 9:50 pm I have to admit, this is some pretty interesting information here. To me, there was always something delightfully batshit insane about ANIMA based on all the art I've seen. I'd say the last movie could get real interesting if Yamashita has something to say about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Mon Oct 12, 2015 6:21 am BlueBasilisk wrote: Unit 02 Allegorica is pretty hideous. It looks much cooler when Rei uses it with Unit 00-F: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Oct 12, 2015 7:19 am NemZ wrote: Interesting stuff. That pegasus backpack thing is stupid as hell though.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Mon Oct 12, 2015 7:21 pm Everytime something with 4 paws comes up I'm reminded of the megacamels from starwars and their countless design flaws. It makes the pegasus thing legit...almost

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Oct 12, 2015 7:26 pm unz wrote: Everytime something with 4 paws comes up I'm reminded of the megacamels from starwars and their countless design flaws. It makes the pegasus thing legit...almost

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Mon Oct 12, 2015 7:31 pm the ones used on the planet .....hot? The empire's white megathings. From the empire strikes back. They can't turn/are exposed/ heavy/ can't step on everything, Idk

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Oct 12, 2015 7:37 pm unz wrote: the ones used on the planet .....hot? The empire's white megathings. From the empire strikes back. They can't turn/are exposed/ heavy/ can't step on everything, Idk

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Mon Oct 12, 2015 7:39 pm Ahah I think I remember them humming in metallic disappointment when falling and exploding. Yeah it's the tanks

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Oct 12, 2015 9:52 pm Bagheera wrote: It looks pretty cool, though. I guess the extra legs help the unit gain speed before takeoff, and then the wings and rockets help it achieve orbit? It's so dumb it goes over the top and cycles back around to cool (and it's not like it's the craziest shit in Anima, what with dog and cat Evas and such).

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Oct 12, 2015 10:04 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: It looks like they're used for braking too. There's a pic in one of the chapters of Unit 02 touching down on the moon in a skid with the back legs acting as anchors.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Oct 13, 2015 1:58 pm It's such a mundane use you don't even consider it. That's the power of Yamashita! I made a pretty significant update to the original post. I added release dates for the movies and the chapters, added a new picture to the Torwart section and two new pictures and a new comparison in the Armaros/Mark.06 section. I also added new entries for The Magoroku Sword, Lilith's Barrier, and a pretty lengthy section on the evolution of Unit 01!

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Oct 13, 2015 2:26 pm Again, great work BlueBasilisk. Reading this thread makes me want more and more that compilation book.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Wed Oct 14, 2015 2:59 am I kind of hope anima is just one of the influences, I don't dig the loop idea if I have to check all eva works
